default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client status and prioritize tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Exec is churning next week (Feb 2);** deliver the final 10 articles by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Smith is the top priority;** focus on new articles, refreshes, and industry page updates.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**Smith's industry pages need more specific lingo** throughout, not just in the first two modules, per Maddie's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**An engineering ticket requires a response** clarifying the goal: infuse anonymized SME insights from YouTube videos into articles to create customer-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

## Topics

### Exec Churn

  - [Exec is churning next week (Feb 2).](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Past dissatisfaction with content quality and backlinks, despite recent improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Action:** Deliver the final 10 articles by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

### Smith Prioritization

  - [Smith is the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**New Content:** Jo is building a new content calendar with fresh topics for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Refreshes:** Usman is working through a list of article refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Industry Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Maddie noted industry-specific themes were only in the first two modules.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Action:** Integrate industry lingo and themes throughout all modules.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Review Process:** Jo will confirm with Maddie if a staging review is required before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

### Production & Publishing

  - [**Progress:** Usman published the last 3 articles in the receptionist/cluster topic.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Process Documentation:** Usman will record videos for:](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
      - [Publishing new micro-copies in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
      - [Engineering to add new sections in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To create comprehensive, one-time guides and avoid rework.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)

### Engineering Ticket: SME Insights

  - [**Context:** An engineering ticket concerns using YouTube videos from a lawyer.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use anonymized insights from the videos to create customer-specific content (e.g., for law firms, dentists).](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**Action:** Usman to respond to the ticket with this clarification.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Usman:**](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [Prioritize Smith tasks: new articles, refreshes, and industry page updates.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [Deliver Exec's final 10 articles by Monday, Feb 2.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [Record process videos for Webflow and Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
      - [Respond to the engineering ticket about SME insights.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [Confirm with Maddie if a staging review is needed for Smith's updated industry pages.](https://fathom.video/share/u37uPrDqLCR18HpHXCzvotUfwFYVsuNG?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

action_items.description: Record publishing workflow video for new pages
Record microcopy video for new Webflow sections
Record video for engineering re: Atlas microcopy integration
Add industry lingo to Smith industry pages; deliver this week
Confirm w/ Smith if staging review needed for industry pages; update Usman
Reply to engineering re: anonymized SME insights in articles
